description_long: This is a pair of sporty wraparound sunglasses featuring a single, continuous blue-tinted lens that curves smoothly across the front, providing wide coverage for the eyes. The frame is constructed with a lightweight, openwork design, incorporating geometric cutouts along the temples and brow for both style and ventilation. The temples are slender and slightly curved, ensuring a secure fit around the ears, and they display a bold, stylized logo near the hinges. The bridge is integrated into the frame, forming a seamless connection between the two sides of the lens. The overall design is aerodynamic and modern, suitable for active urban environments or outdoor sports. The surface finish is sleek and glossy, enhancing the contemporary aesthetic.
description: Sporty wraparound sunglasses with a blue-tinted lens, openwork black frame, and bold logo on the temples.
description_view_0: Front view shows the continuous blue lens and the full wraparound coverage of the frame.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlights the openwork temple design and the prominent white logo near the hinge.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the curvature of the frame and the integrated bridge, as well as the inner structure of the temples.
description_view_3: Right-side view mirrors the left, showing the openwork temple and logo placement.
attribute_frame_design: The frame features a wraparound, aerodynamic shape with a full-rim structure. It is thin and lightweight, with geometric cutouts along the temples and brow for ventilation and style. The temples are slender and curve gently to fit securely behind the ears.
attribute_lens_tint: The lens is a single, continuous piece with a deep blue tint, providing a mirrored and slightly reflective effect. The tint is uniform across the entire lens, offering a bold, sporty appearance.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is integrated into the frame, forming a seamless, molded connection between the lenses. It is wide and flat, with no visible nose pads or separate components.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are detailed with openwork geometric patterns, giving a lightweight and ventilated look. A bold, stylized logo is present near the hinge, and the temples taper smoothly towards the ends.
attribute_brand_logo: A white, stylized logo is visible on both temples near the hinges, printed or embossed for high visibility.
